EmailTemplate.name: Ascension-EmailTemplate-ManagerNotification-NewUserIntialLogin
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if($styleSheet) $styleSheet #end #if( $headerTemplate ) $headerTemplate #end

Hello,

The initial network password for $Map.get("Name") is #if($Map.get("Password"))$Map.get("Password")#end

Your password needs to be reset on the initial login.

For all associates follow step 1 below, additionally If you are located at a legacy Presence Health sites that use Meditech or Epic, AMG sites affiliated with Meditech/Epic hospitals and/or are a remote associate who has an Ascension-issued device on the Presence Health Domain you must follow step 2 as well.

  1) To reset your AMITA password go to the AHPM site : https://ahpm.ascension.org For first time logon you will enter your username, temporary password provided above, and select “AMITA” from the drop down

  2)If you are located at a legacy Presence Health sites, go to one of the two URLs below go to: https://remote.presencehealth.org/

For shared workstations at a legacy Presence Health location:

Go to: https://appstore.presencehealth.net.

  o Once logged in, find the gear icon in the upper right corner of the page and click “Account Settings.”

  o Click “Change Password.”

  o Fill in your old password, new password and confirm, then click “OK.”

NOTE: The password must meet the requirements:

  o At least 12 characters long

  o Contain three of the following: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers or symbols

  o Passwords cannot contain your personal information such as first or last name.

  o The first 12 characters of the new password cannot match the first 12 characters of any previously used passwords.

Thank you,
The IAM Operations Team

#if( $footerTemplate ) $footerTemplate #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying managers when an employee's account(s) are modified. Note that in addition to the declared arguments, all workflow variables, Step arguments, and Approval arguments defined in the Workflow are also available.

Argument.name: identityDisplayName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: operation
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that is being changed.

EmailTemplate.Subject: Initial Login Instructions for New User
